description: Cross-source inbox triage from the inbox-triage orchestration. One entry with a stable id (re-published in place each scheduler tick) summarising recent mail (Inbox + Focused + @-mentions) and Teams (DMs + allowlisted channel mentions) classified into needs-action / wait-reply / meeting-prep / fyi / noise. Per-message Mark-handled and Dismiss buttons mutate the triage-state ledger via Shared/scripts/mark-ledger-item.ps1. Pinned when any needs-action items are present. Companion daily summary lives at the Zakira category `triage-state:daily-summary` for the future daily-morning-digest composer.

contentTemplate.label: Needs action
contentTemplate.description: Use level 'warning' when there are needs-action items; omit otherwise. Body bullets the top 5 with source tag, subject, and rationale.

contentTemplate.title: Needs action
contentTemplate.description: Messages the sender expects a response or action from me. Each item is a nested section titled `[Mail|Teams] <subject>` with a keyValue (From/When/Channel/Folder/Flags/Why/Open) and two CLI actions: Mark handled (calls mark-ledger-item.ps1 -Action completed) and Dismiss (-Action dismissed). onSuccess=keep so single-item clicks do not archive the whole entry. Items are sorted with @mentions first, then high importance, then most recent. Capped at 15; surplus rendered as a 'Plus N more in this bucket not shown.' footer.

contentTemplate.title: @Mentions
contentTemplate.description: Messages where I appear in the mentions collection (regardless of primary category). Same per-item shape and actions as Needs action. Often overlaps with Needs action; the cross-section view makes it easier to spot.

contentTemplate.title: Wait reply
contentTemplate.description: Threads I sent into that have received a reply requiring my continued response. Use sparingly per the classifier rules - most Re: chains are needs-action.

contentTemplate.title: Meeting prep
contentTemplate.description: Calendar invites, agendas, pre-read material, or scheduling negotiations tied to upcoming meetings. Separate from needs-action even when an RSVP is implicit.

contentTemplate.title: FYI
contentTemplate.description: Informational messages with no action expected (CC/BCC, distribution lists, broadcast updates). Default-collapsed.

contentTemplate.title: Noise
contentTemplate.description: Automated notifications, monitoring digests, marketing, bouncebacks. Default-collapsed. Surface them at all because misclassification happens; quick scan opportunity.

contentTemplate.label: Run Notes
contentTemplate.description: Free-form footer with the run id, dryRun and forceSurface flags.

expectedActions.label: Open Outlook (Inbox)
expectedActions.description: Jump to the Outlook web Inbox.

expectedActions.label: Open Orchestra: Inbox list in To Do
expectedActions.description: Convenience link to the Microsoft To Do list this orchestration syncs aging needs-action items into.

expectedActions.label: Dismiss
expectedActions.description: Archive this run snapshot. The next scheduler tick will re-publish a fresh one under the same stable id.
